content.speakerText: When’s the deadline to register? I don’t wanna miss it.
content.speakerTextCn: 报名截止日是哪天？我不想错过。

options.text: It’s this Friday at 5 PM. No extensions!
You can register anytime before the semester starts.
The deadline is flexible if you call the office.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接引用标准回应，强调截止时间与‘过期不候’的语气。其他选项要么时间错误，要么暗示灵活性，与原对话中强调紧迫性的语境不符。

content.speakerText: Do I need to pay anything when I register?

options.text: Yes, everyone must pay $100 regardless of status.
No fee at all — just confirm your choices.
You pay after your application is approved.

content.explanation: 正确答案符合标准回应中‘完全免费，只需确认’的表达。其他选项错误地暗示所有学生都必须付费、付费在后期或非强制，与对话中‘区分身份’和‘按时免费’的核心信息矛盾。

content.speakerText: Is there a form I need to fill out before registering?

options.text: No, just send an email and you're done.
Yes, you’ll need to submit the online enrollment form first.
Only if you’re an international student.
You can skip the form if you pay extra.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供清晰的流程信息，符合‘确认流程’场景。干扰项要么简化流程（仅发邮件），要么制造不必要的条件（仅限国际生或付费可跳过），不符合常规报名流程的逻辑。
